title: About Virtuals Protocol
quote: Virtuals Protocol is a society of AI agents: a coordinated, onchain ecosystem where autonomous agents generate services or products and engage in commerce with humans and other agents.

title: Agentic Framework (GAME)
quote: A modular agentic framework that empowers AI agents to autonomously plan and make decisions based on goals, personality, context, and available actions.

title: GAME Framework — SDK and Cloud
quote: GAME SDK: An open-sourced repo that allows developers full customizability when building an application or agent using GAME. GAME Cloud: A hosted, low-code service that offers an interface to configure agents and applications.

title: Agent Commerce Protocol (ACP)
quote: The ACP's design addresses these fundamental challenges through its smart contract-based escrow system, cryptographic verification of agreements, and independent evaluation phase.

title: ACP Technical Deep Dive
quote: Smart contracts provide essential functions: they hold funds in escrow, automatically execute transactions when conditions are met, and create an immutable record of all agreements and their outcomes.

title: Virtuals Launch Mechanics
quote: Once total liquidity reaches 42,000 $VIRTUAL, a liquidity pool is automatically created and paired with the agent token on Uniswap V2. All liquidity pool (LP) tokens generated during agent graduation are automatically staked under a long-term lock of ten (10) years.

title: VIRTUAL Agents as Programmable Decentralized Entities
quote: Every time a new AI agent is created, 1 billion tokens specific to that agent are minted. Token holders can participate in key decisions about the agent's development, behavior, and future upgrades, fostering a decentralized approach to AI management.

title: Immutable Contribution Vault (ICV)
quote: The multilayered structure of the ICV includes: smart contract wallet ownership as the base layer, individual VIRTUAL agents as ERC-6551 NFTs, cognitive, voice, and visual cores stored beneath each agent, and Service NFTs of each core where approved contributions are stored within each VIRTUAL agent.

title: Security Audits
quote: The Virtuals Protocol team engaged PeckShield to conduct security audits on March 10, 2024 and October 31, 2024. These audits covered all the smart contracts related to the protocol.

title: How-to: Genesis Launch
quote: 21,000 $VIRTUALS is committed, with a maximum allocation of 566 $VIRTUAL per user. If this condition is not met, then no agent will be launched, and all the committed $VIRTUALS and Virgen points will be refunded to the users.

title: Understanding Virtuals Protocol: A Comprehensive Overview
Agent Creation
quote: 100 $VIRTUAL tokens are needed for the initial agent creation, upon which it is deployed on a bonding curve. A standard ERC-20 token for the agent (e.g., $LUNA) is created with a fixed supply of 1,000,000,000 tokens. Once 42,000 $VIRTUAL has accumulated in the bonding curve, the agent will graduate.

title: What is Virtuals and the AI agents?
quote: Virtuals Protocol is an AI-focused platform built on the Base L2 blockchain (created by Coinbase on top of Ethereum). Every time the Virtuals Protocol creates a new AI Agent, it simultaneously mints 1 billion tokens specific to that agent.

title: Crypto: Virtuals Bets Everything On Solana And Multichain
quote: The expansion includes a Meteora Pool for liquidity strengthening and subsidies of 42,000 VIRTUAL tokens for Solana and Base developers, plus a strategic Solana fund converting 1% of trading fees into SOL.

title: Virtuals Protocol Review 2026: Decentralized AI Agents
quote: Virtuals Protocol is a decentralized platform built on the Ethereum Layer 2 network, Base, that enables users to create, co-own, and monetize AI agents using cryptocurrency and blockchain technology. Launched in October 2024, the protocol simplifies the creation and deployment of AI agents on the blockchain.

title: PeckShield Audit Report — Virtual Bonding v1.0
What is Virtuals Protocol: 2026 Beginners' Guide
quote: Virtuals Protocol is the largest decentralized platform for tokenizing autonomous AI agents, with over 18,000 deployed across Base, Ethereum, Solana, Ronin, and Arbitrum.

title: Virtuals Protocol — $VIRTUAL now tradeable on Solana (announcement)
